name: UNITED STATES v. SELLS ENGINEERING, INC., et al.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in UNITED STATES v. SELLS ENGINEERING, INC., et al. (463 U.S. 418, 1982 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
